## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make e2e`
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused test coverage
- [ ] SQLite and JSON contract changes are documented
- [ ] No jars, shards, databases, credentials, or internal data are included
- [ ] Commits include a DCO sign-off

## Compatibility

Describe schema, extractor version, CLI, output, or platform implications.

## Related Issue

Link the issue when applicable.
